name: Olive Garden Chocolate Chip Cookie Dough Chee
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Generously grease the bottom and sides of a 10-inch springform pan.
3. Combine margarine with chocolate cookie crumbs and press onto the bottom and sides of the pan.
4. Using an electric mixer on high speed, combine cream cheese, sugar, eggs, and flour until smooth. Add vanilla extract and sour cream, mixing just until blended.
5. Pour half of the batter into the prepared crust.
6. Cut cookie dough into golf ball-sized chunks and drop them into the batter. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the top.
7. Pour remaining batter over the toppings.
8. Bake for 60 minutes.
9. Turn off the oven and open the door to the broil position. Allow cake to remain in the oven for an additional 30 minutes.
10. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
11. Remove sides of the pan and top with fresh whipped cream. Sprinkle with additional chocolate chips and chopped walnuts.
